property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:39:21.399 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.utkarsh.core.UtkarshCoreBankingApplicationTests]: UtkarshCoreBankingApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:39:21.935 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.utkarsh.core.UtkarshCoreBankingApplication for test class com.utkarsh.core.UtkarshCoreBankingApplicationTests 11:39:22.686 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
